# RafayGen AI

RafayGen AI is an advanced AI studio by WaveTech Limited.

Website: https://wavetechlimited.com
Brand: RafayGen AI
Company: WaveTech Limited
Primary Product: AI reasoning, coding, math, and multimodal workflows.

Public Pages:
- https://wavetechlimited.com/
